Name: PV String Size and Subarrays

Caption.String: If the modules your system all have the same orientation and strings have the same number of modules, enable Subarray 1 and disable Subarrays 2, 3, and 4. For an array divided into groups of modules with different orientations, tracking, string lengths or shading, enable up to four subarrays.

Callbacks: on_load{'PV String Size and Subarrays'} = define() {
